owner: Intelligence Engine Agent / Build & Release Agent
purpose: V3.3.1 script pre-gate for WaveSight Raw / Pool / Core Pool readiness before Signal Card assets and frontstage release. It checks evidence usability, Pool balance, large-company concentration, and business-signal coverage for the current Card-first pipeline.
downstream_release_rule: Script pre-gate pass is not enough. Signal Card assets and frontstage release may use Raw / Pool only after a current guanlan-daily-monitor-qc report generated after the latest quality gate returns allow or scoped allow_with_degradation. Asset chain readiness must reject stale QC reports.

weekend_release_policy.purpose: Weekend AI business-signal source volume is often lower, especially for customer cases and funding. This policy only relaxes light quantity floors after Raw / Pool volume, source quality, readable full text, Raw QC, page-type, large-vendor, and relevance gates remain clean. Signal Card generation, source-first, frontstage regression, and site freshness gates still have to pass.

pool_route_definitions.core_pool: Full evidence candidate only: original URL, readable full text, extraction_method, readability_score>=24, high/medium extraction quality, non-index evidence object, content hash, full text hash, key excerpts, raw_qc_decision=allow, importance_score>=4, and one of the six required importance types.
pool_route_definitions.emerging_pool: Trackable early signal with usable evidence but incomplete core proof; may include allow_with_degradation only for follow-up and low-strength observation.
pool_route_definitions.user_feedback_pool: Community, issue, forum, HN, Reddit or X feedback; proves discussion or friction only, not company facts.
pool_route_definitions.watchlist: Named subject or direction worth tracking but missing full evidence, snapshot, hash, excerpt, original confirmation or second-source work.
pool_route_definitions.index_only: Homepage, directory, product display, docs index, README, package/model page, marketplace listing, search result, SEO page or curated entrance record kept only for indexing.
pool_route_definitions.discard: Blocked, unusable, no URL/no usable snapshot, obvious noise or raw_qc_decision=block.

importance_score_rubric.1: No core WaveSight importance signal; archive only.
importance_score_rubric.2: Supporting commercial, risk or adoption context only; cannot enter core_pool.
importance_score_rubric.3: Plausible signal or viewpoint but lacks concrete event strength, actor specificity, source authority, or downstream relevance.
importance_score_rubric.4: Concrete important change in one of the six required importance types with named actor, action, time or usable original evidence.
importance_score_rubric.5: Major platform, frontier lab, large customer, known investor, industry-shaping technical shift, or high-impact market judgment with strong evidence.

manual_qc_p0_blockers: downstream-worthy Raw lacks usable full_text, snapshot or evidence hash
core_pool Raw has low readability_score or missing extraction_method / extractor diagnostics
core_pool contains any Raw item whose raw_qc_decision is block or allow_with_degradation
Raw item lacks source URL, usable snapshot, evidence hash, or key excerpt and is still treated as downstream-worthy evidence

homepage, docs directory, product index, pricing navigation, README, package page, model page, marketplace listing, search-result page or SEO page is promoted to core_pool without a dated event or change
discovery entrance text is used as fact-main evidence without original-page capture
source_level is used as a value score, core_pool hard gate, or automatic downgrade reason
importance_score>=4 is assigned without a concrete importance_reason that matches the 1-5 rubric
allow_with_degradation item exceeds its degradation route cap, such as missing_full_text entering emerging_pool or index_only_or_directory_page entering watchlist
pool_count is used as the only Pool health metric while routed_pool_count or AI HOT index-only split is missing
keyword monitoring path is missing, too thin, or dominated by HN / Reddit / X / community feedback
AI HOT daily or follow-builders selected material is treated as final fact evidence without original-page capture

any of the five required business-signal importance types is missing from Raw or Pool: important_case, important_funding, important_technical_trend, important_product_or_service, important_vertical_solution
generic search or Bing fallback result enters core_pool without original evidence chain and Raw QC allow
dictionary, translation, pronunciation, HTML tag reference, tutorial, directory, SEO or search-result page enters Raw as downstream-worthy evidence
Core Pool lane quota is force-filled with a weak or non-qualified item instead of reporting an empty lane gap
Large-company product or lab news dominates core_pool and squeezes out funding, customer deployment, vertical workflow, pricing, procurement, regulatory, or emerging-company evidence
